title: Hayek and Spontaneous Order
description: Hayek's spontaneous-order view explains how institutions like money, law, and language emerge from repeated coordination rather than central design. Bitcoin is often analyzed through this lens as an emergent monetary institution.

resources.title: Hayek: The Use of Knowledge in Society
resources.notes: Core text on decentralized knowledge and emergent order.

resources.title: Schelling Points
resources.notes: Game-theory bridge for spontaneous institutional convergence.
